item.title: 欧洲天然气未平仓合约量下滑，交易员应对市场动荡
item.description: 欧洲天然气期货未平仓合约量跌至五个月低点，交易员们正努力应对中东地区不可预测的消息流引发的剧烈价格波动，并纷纷平仓离场。【原文：Open interest in European natural gas futures dropped to a five-month low, with traders struggling to navigate intense price swings driven by unpredictable newsflow from the Middle East and closing their positions.】

item.title: 伊朗战争对中国"茶壶炼油厂"意味着什么
item.description:
中国可能失去一个关键的供应来源。

【原文：

China may lose a crucial source of supply.

】

item.title: 零散话题：伊朗战争及其对中国石油的影响（播客）
item.description: 伊朗战争爆发后，全球油价均大幅飙升。但并非所有石油都具有同等价值。 显然，大量伊朗石油专门销往中国。更重要的是，由于伊朗石油受到制裁，其中许多最终流向了中国所谓的"茶壶炼油厂"——这类炼油厂规模较小，通常由独立公司拥有。另一方面，众所周知中国多年来一直在扩充战略石油储备，加之电动汽车的兴起，其对石油的依赖程度可能正在降低。【原文：In the wake of the war in Iran, oil prices have shot up for everyone. But not all oil is exactly equal. And, obviously, a lot of Iranian oil goes to China specifically. Furthermore, because Iran’s oil is sanctioned, a lot of it winds up at China’s so-called “teapot” refineries, which tend to be smaller and owned by independent companies. On the other hand, China has famously been building up its strategic petroleum stockpiles for years, and due to the rise of electric vehicles, they may have les】

item.title: 莫斯科互联网中断推动寻呼机和纸质地图销量攀升
item.description: 随着莫斯科居民适应首都反复出现的移动互联网中断，该市线下通讯设备和纸质地图的销售量激增。【原文：Sales of offline communication gear and paper maps surged in Moscow as residents adapt to repeated mobile internet disruptions in Russia’s capital.】

item.title: 伯克利确认指导意见，警告伊朗战争影响市场情绪
item.description: 伯克利集团控股公司重申了全年盈利预期，但警告称中东冲突正"严重影响市场风险偏好"。【原文：Berkeley Group Holdings Plc reiterated its profit guidance for the year but warned that the conflict in the Middle East was “weighing heavily on risk sentiment.”】

item.title: 印度国家证券交易所首次公开募股为数千名股东开启售股通道
item.description: 据知情人士透露，印度国家证券交易所有限公司的数千名股东可能很快获得出售股票的机会，这是该交易所计划进行首次公开募股（IPO）的一部分，符合监管要求。【原文：Thousands of shareholders of the National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. may soon get a chance to sell stock as part of the bourse’s planned initial public offering, in line with regulatory requirements, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: ERG敦促刚果结束非法采矿活动，此前发生致命山体滑坡
item.description: 欧亚资源集团旗下子公司敦促刚果民主共和国停止在其铜矿许可证区域内发生的非法采矿活动，此前该区域发生致命山体滑坡事故。【原文：A Eurasian Resources Group unit urged the Democratic Republic of Congo to stop illegal mining activities on one of the firm’s copper licenses following a deadly landslide.】

item.title: 欧元兑美元汇率跌至七个月低点，受石油危机影响
item.description: 随着中东战争升级，美元全面走强，欧元跌至8月以来最低水平。【原文：The euro fell to its lowest level since August amid broad gains for the US dollar as the Middle East war escalated.】

item.title: 德国化工企业警告战争连锁反应将导致产量削减
item.description: 德国化工行业警告称，伊朗战争引发的冲击波正开始在欧洲最大经济体中蔓延，随着供应链陷入瘫痪和能源成本飙升，多家企业已开始缩减产量。【原文：Germany’s chemical industry warned shockwaves from the Iran war are beginning to ricochet through Europe’s largest economy with a number of companies dialing down output as supply chains seize up and energy costs surge.】

item.title: 中国连续第15周上调人民币中间价，创历史纪录
item.description: 中国人民币汇率连续第十五周上调，创下有记录以来最长的周涨幅纪录，表明尽管伊朗战争引发汇率波动，中国仍持续支持人民币升值。【原文：China has raised the yuan fixing for a 15th straight week, the longest weekly gaining streak on record, showing continued support for the currency to appreciate despite volatility from the Iran war.】

item.title: 日本将以伊朗战争前价格出售国家储备石油
item.description: 日本经济产业大臣表示，日本将以中东战争爆发前的价格水平出售国家石油储备。【原文：Japan will sell oil from its national reserves at prices based on levels before the start of the Middle East war, according to the country’s trade minister.】

item.title: 文科利昂母公司寻求通过德国IPO为防务公司筹集3亿欧元
item.description: 私募股权公司Star Capital计划通过国防技术集团Vincorion SE的首次公开募股（IPO）筹集3亿欧元（约合3.45亿美元）。【原文：Private equity firm Star Capital is looking to raise €300 million ($345 million) through the initial public offering of defense technology group Vincorion SE.】

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡危机持续发酵，油价徘徊于高位
item.description: 3月12日，德黑兰遭遇空袭后，多栋建筑和车辆遭到破坏。【原文：Buildings and vehicles destroyed following airstrikes in Tehran, on March 12.】

item.title: 罗马尼亚通胀放缓，伊朗战争新冲击迫在眉睫
item.description: 罗马尼亚通胀如预期放缓，但全球能源价格飙升可能扭转这一趋势，并使央行短期内难以放松货币政策。【原文：Romanian inflation slowed as expected but surging global energy prices threaten to reverse the trend and prevent the central bank from easing monetary policy anytime soon.】

item.title: 英国经济年初意外停滞
item.description: 英国经济在一月份意外陷入停滞，这表明在中美洲冲突可能对消费者和企业造成新一轮冲击之前，经济活动就已经陷入停滞。【原文：The UK economy unexpectedly failed to grow in January, suggesting activity was stalling even before conflict in the Middle East threatened to deliver a fresh blow to consumers and businesses.】

item.title: 每桶100美元的油价将为非洲最大国家带来福音
item.description: 在俄罗斯全面入侵乌克兰导致能源价格飙升后，阿尔及利亚当局获得了一条救命稻草。如今，随着伊朗战争推高油价，人们寄望于此能带来新的转机。【原文：Algerian authorities were thrown a lifeline after Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine sent energy prices soaring, now there’s hope that the rise in oil prices driven by the war in Iran will offer another.】

item.title: 外国投资者就越南电力纠纷发出法律行动警告
item.description: 外国投资者敦促越南政府解决长期存在的太阳能和风电项目付款纠纷，并警告称若未能履行协议条款，生产商可能采取法律行动。【原文：Foreign investors have urged Vietnam’s government to resolve a long-running dispute over payments to solar and wind power projects, warning that producers may pursue legal action if agreed terms are not honored.】

item.title: 若中东冲突持续三个月 泰国经济增速恐减半
item.description: 旅游业疲软、出口放缓和能源价格上涨三重打击，可能使泰国今年的经济增长进一步放缓。【原文：A triple hit from weaker tourism, softer exports and higher energy prices threatens to drag Thailand’s growth even lower this year.】

item.title: 印度股市临近罕见技术性突破，油价风险攀升
item.description: 印度举步维艰的股市正面临关键的技术考验，基准指数逼近突破重要长期支撑位，而油价飙升带来的压力正持续加剧。【原文：India’s struggling equity market is facing a pivotal technical test, with the benchmark index close to breaking a key long-term support level, intensifying strain from surging oil prices.】

item.title: 英国经济1月意外停滞
香港将扩大"点名批评"名单至IPO律师
item.description: 香港计划将"点名批评"制度扩大至律师事务所和审计师，以打击草率的上市申请，从而加强改善该市首次公开募股质量的行动。【原文：Hong Kong plans to expand its “name-and-shame” regime for sloppy listing applications to include law firms and auditors, stepping up a campaign to improve the quality of initial public offerings in the city.】

item.title: 高盛称伊朗战争风险拖累兰币汇率，迫使南非央行调整利率
item.description: 油价持续走高可能迫使南非央行考虑加息，因兰特贬值导致通胀率攀升至央行难以容忍的水平。【原文：Prolonged higher oil prices could force the South African central bank to consider raising interest rates as a weaker rand pushes inflation higher than it’s prepared to tolerate.】

item.title: 美国豁免令释放1900万桶俄罗斯石油供采购
item.description: 在亚洲水域航行的约30艘油轮所载的俄罗斯原油和燃料，在获得美国临时豁免后，可能可供购买——该豁免允许购买已在航行中的货物。【原文：Russian crude oil and fuel on about 30 tankers in Asian waters is potentially available for purchase after the US granted a temporary waiver to buy cargoes that were already at sea.】

item.title: 泰国对中东大米出口暂停，战争给农民带来压力
item.description: 随着战争升级，泰国大米对中东的出口已暂停，这场冲突扰乱了对该国最大粮食市场的运输，使本就因成本上升和海外需求减少而举步维艰的农民雪上加霜。【原文：Thai rice exports to the Middle East were halted as the escalating war disrupts shipments to the nation’s largest market for the grain, further straining farmers grappling with rising costs and reduced overseas demand.】

item.title: 经济学家预测欧洲央行将维持利率至2028年，与市场预期形成分歧
item.description: 经济学家认为，即便通胀威胁再度浮现，欧洲央行仍将维持利率不变直至2027年。【原文：Economists see the European Central Bank keeping interest rates unchanged through 2027 even as inflation threats resurface.】

item.title: 瑞典"硅谷天堂"与美国争夺新兴初创企业
item.description: 瑞典人均诞生的十亿美元初创企业数量位居欧洲之首，但许多新兴企业正涌向美国。为阻止这一趋势，各界呼吁深化资本市场以提供支持。【原文：Sweden churns out more billion-dollar startups per capita than anywhere in Europe, but a lot of its rising stars are heading to the US, and calls are growing for deeper capital markets to help stop them.】

item.title: 马来西亚称其补贴支出将因油价上涨而增加
item.description: 马来西亚第二财政部长阿米尔·哈姆扎·阿齐赞表示，由于中东战争导致油价上涨，该国的补贴支出将增加。【原文：Malaysia’s subsidy bill will increase because of higher oil prices caused by the war in the Middle East, said Second Finance Minister Amir Hamzah Azizan.】

item.title: 日元跌至2024年7月以来最低点，伊朗战争升级
item.description: 由于中东持续战事推高油价并加剧通胀担忧，投资者在周末前规避风险，日元汇率跌至2024年以来最低点。【原文：The yen fell to its weakest level since 2024 on investors reducing risks ahead of the weekend, as the continuing Middle East war pushed up oil prices and stoked inflation fears.】

item.title: 香港放宽双类股上市门槛
item.description: 香港正提议降低双类股在该市交易所上市的最低市值要求，这是其重振全球首次公开募股首选地地位的更广泛举措之一。【原文：Hong Kong is proposing to lower the minimum market value for dual-class shares to debut on the city’s exchange, part of a broader push to revive its status as a premier destination for global initial public offerings.】

item.title: 软银旗下PayPay在美国成功上市后，仍考虑维持双重上市计划
item.description: 软银集团旗下的PayPay公司首席执行官表示，该公司正考虑在东京证券交易所进行双重上市。此前，这家数字支付公司在纽约证券交易所完成8.8亿美元的首次公开募股。【原文：SoftBank Group Corp.-backed PayPay Corp. is open to a dual listing with a presence on Tokyo’s bourse, its chief said after the digital payments company’s $880 million trading debut in New York.】
